case_title: HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. VS. ANNIE LEE et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, ANNIE DOES 1-15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-12-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-13-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-27-2006

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-15, INCLUSIVE

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT RE WAIVING DIFFERENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A.
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS, PER CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, ANNIE $1,992.32 PRINCIPAL, $227.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,219.32, SEE SCANNED DOC
